zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期盘整趋势明显
zh.content:
目前以太坊价格徘徊在2107.8美元附近，接近日内高点2110.43，低点2095.68。短期价格略低于20日均线2122.61美元，显示多头动能受限，市场处于整理阶段。价格未能明显突破均线，暗示短线上行空间有限。  

MACD显示为-15.41360，虽缺乏信号线参考，但负值表明空头力量略占上风，市场多空均衡偏弱。RSI数据不可用，无法确认超买或超卖状态，但结合价格与均线，短线可能保持震荡或缓慢回调。技术指标显示多头动力不足，投资者需谨慎追高。  

支撑位主要关注2095附近的短期支撑，如果跌破此位置，可能进一步测试2080-2075美元区间。阻力位在2120-2125美元附近，突破后或为短期反弹起点。价格若在支撑与阻力区间反复震荡，趋势偏向区间整理而非单边走势。  

交易建议方面，短线可采取区间操作策略，低多高空为主。若价格突破2125美元并稳住，可考虑适度加仓多头；若下破2095美元支撑，则需减仓或设置止损以防进一步回落。风险管理与耐心等待趋势确认至关重要。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently exhibiting a mild consolidation phase around $2,107.8. The 24-hour movement of 0.46% coupled with a tight high-low range of $2,110.43 to $2,095.68 indicates limited volatility, suggesting the market is awaiting a catalyst. Price remains slightly below the 20-day simple moving average (SMA) of $2,122.61, signaling a cautious short-term bearish bias. Traders should watch for sustained moves above this SMA to confirm bullish momentum resumption.

The MACD reading of -15.41 reflects ongoing bearish pressure, though the absence of a signal line prevents a full crossover analysis. This negative MACD implies that downside momentum could persist if market sentiment weakens. In such scenarios, traders often look for potential reversal signals or confirmation from other oscillators. While RSI data is not currently available, monitoring it upon release will be crucial to identify overbought or oversold conditions, which could hint at near-term trend exhaustion.

Support is likely to form near $2,095, coinciding with recent intraday lows, providing a floor for downside risk. Resistance is evident around $2,122, aligned with the SMA(20) and recent intraday highs. Breaching either level decisively could guide the next directional move. A close above $2,122 might open a path to $2,140–$2,150, while a drop below $2,095 could target $2,080 or lower, exposing traders to short-term retracements.

For trading strategy, a conservative approach favors waiting for price confirmation beyond the SMA(20) or a rebound from support before entering new positions. Short-term scalpers could exploit the tight range for intraday opportunities, emphasizing disciplined stop-loss placement near $2,095 for longs or $2,122 for shorts. Medium-term traders may consider positioning cautiously, balancing exposure until clearer momentum signals emerge. Monitoring volume spikes or news-driven catalysts will also be key to avoiding false breakouts.
